subcodes.first_line: The praise of all who praise, the remembrance of them that remember, and the description of such as describe, in truth pertaineth unto creation, for the Source [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حامدین و ذکر ذاکرین و وصف واصفین فی الحقیقه راجع بخلق است چه که مبدء
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement
